title: Tidelands Ownership
doc_html:
§6.  Tidelands Ownership

Section 6.  Revenues and royalties obtained from minerals located beyond the seaward boundary of the state belong to the state.
doc_text:
§6.  Tidelands Ownership
Section 6.  Revenues and royalties obtained from minerals located beyond the seaward boundary of the state belong to the state.
